title: CMC Vellore Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Staff III Radiographer Posts
description: The Christian Medical College Vellore (CMC Vellore) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Staff III Radiographer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th, 12th, B.Sc., and Diploma can apply for the CMC Vellore Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
